summary: Theme System Implementation Test: Partial Success. AppearanceSettings component renders correctly on Profile page with all 3 theme options (Use device setting/Light/Dark). Selection UI works and preference persists to localStorage. CRITICAL BUG: Visual theme does NOT change when switching themes - profile.tsx uses hardcoded COLORS import instead of dynamic theme colors from useTheme().

integration_issues.issue: Theme preference is saved and persisted, but visual colors don't change. Profile page uses static COLORS import instead of dynamic theme colors from useTheme() hook.

test_results.appearance_settings_render: PASS - Component visible on Profile page with all 3 options
test_results.selection_ui: PASS - Checkmark moves to selected option on click
test_results.theme_persistence: PASS - localStorage key 'theme_preference' stores value correctly (DARK/LIGHT/SYSTEM)
test_results.visual_theme_change: FAIL - Background/text colors do NOT change when switching themes

root_cause_analysis.cause: profile.tsx (line 27) imports static COLORS from theme.ts and uses these in StyleSheet.create(). The dynamic theme colors from useTheme() hook are imported (line 28) but NOT used in the styles.
root_cause_analysis.evidence: grep shows 30+ usages of COLORS.primary, COLORS.background, etc. in profile.tsx styles
root_cause_analysis.fix_required: Replace all COLORS.* usages with theme.colors.* from useTheme() hook throughout the component

action_items: Update profile.tsx to use dynamic theme colors: Replace COLORS.* with theme.colors.* from useTheme()
Convert StyleSheet.create() to dynamic styles that respond to theme changes (either inline styles or useMemo-based StyleSheet)
Update other pages/components that use static COLORS import to use theme-aware colors
Test visual theme changes after fixes
critical_code_review_comments: profile.tsx imports useTheme but only uses it for AppearanceSettings prop - should use theme.colors for all styling
All pages need audit for static COLORS usage - likely many more components affected

success_rate.frontend: 60% - Theme selection/persistence works, visual application fails

seed_data_creation: Theme preference set to DARK in localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme system infrastructure is correctly implemented (ThemeProvider, ThemeContext, themeStore with AsyncStorage persistence, AppearanceSettings UI). The blocking issue is that existing components use hardcoded COLORS import instead of dynamic theme colors. After main agent updates profile.tsx and other pages to use useTheme() colors, retest visual theme switching.
verified_features: 3 theme options with icons and descriptions
failing_features: Visual theme change (background, text colors) when switching Light/Dark/System
